novel_features.name: Portfolio performance tracker
novel_features.description: Track YTD/1Y/all-time returns on your holdings with cost basis, dividends, and current price baked in.
novel_features.rationale: Requires joining local cost-basis state with live quotes and historical dividends — no Yahoo endpoint provides this because cost basis only exists on the user's machine.

novel_features.name: Dividend income report
novel_features.description: See your total dividend income for the year, per-holding breakdown, and yield on cost.
novel_features.rationale: Joins local portfolio lots with cached dividend history. No public tool maintains the state needed to compute this.

novel_features.name: Morning digest across watchlist
novel_features.description: One command: overnight news + biggest movers + earnings today + ex-div dates for everything on your watchlist.
novel_features.rationale: Aggregates data across multiple endpoints filtered by local watchlist — no single API call returns this view.

novel_features.name: Earnings calendar filtered to your holdings
novel_features.description: Only shows upcoming earnings for companies you actually hold or follow.
novel_features.rationale: Cross-joins the local watchlist with calendarEvents data — impossible without local state.

novel_features.name: Options moneyness filter
novel_features.description: Filter an options chain to ATM/OTM/ITM contracts within a days-to-expiration window.
novel_features.rationale: Yahoo's options endpoint returns a full chain; computing moneyness against current spot price requires local processing.

novel_features.name: Local SQL screener over synced fundamentals
novel_features.description: Run arbitrary P/E, P/B, yield, margin, and growth filters against the data you've synced locally.
novel_features.rationale: Yahoo's remote screener is limited to 12 predefined IDs. Arbitrary filters require a local fundamentals index.

novel_features.name: Chrome cookie import fallback
novel_features.description: Import your live Chrome session cookies when Yahoo's crumb handshake is blocked from your IP.
novel_features.rationale: Works around residential/cloud IP rate limits that kill raw API access. No other Yahoo Finance tool offers this fallback.

novel_features.name: Insider-buying signal screener
novel_features.description: Surface companies where insiders are net buyers in the last 30 days, filtered to your watchlist.
novel_features.rationale: Joins insider transactions history with watchlist membership and computes buy/sell ratios — needs local state.

novel_features_built.rationale: Requires joining local cost-basis state with live quotes and historical dividends — no Yahoo endpoint provides this because cost basis only exists on the user's machine.

novel_features_built.rationale: Aggregates data across multiple endpoints filtered by local watchlist — no single API call returns this view.
